navi: Aylì'u ngian nì'it skepek lu.
en: You still sound a bit too formal, though.

navi: Zìsìt amrr ftolia ohe, slä zene fko nivume nìtxan.
en: I studied for five years but there is much to learn.

navi: Hu nawma sa'nok tivul ngeyä tirea.
en: May your spirit run with the Great Mother.

navi: Ma sempul, oel ngati kameie.
en: Father, I see you.

navi: Ma sempul, oel ngati kameie.
en: Father, I see you.

navi: Oeru txoa livu, ma oeyä tsmukan.
en: Forgive me, my brother.

navi: Fìketuwongti oel stìyeftxaw.
en: I will look at this alien.

navi: Fìketuwongti oel stìyeftxaw.
en: I will look at this alien.

navi: Ma 'ite, awngeyä fya'ori zene nga sänume sivi poru… fte tsivun pivlltxe sì tivìran na ayoeng.
en: My daughter, you will teach him our way… to speak and walk as we do.

navi: Ma 'ite, awngeyä fya'ori zene nga sänume sivi poru… fte tsivun pivlltxe sì tivìran na ayoeng.
en: My daughter, you will teach him our way… to speak and walk as we do.

navi: Sevin nìtxan lu aynga nang.
en: You are so pretty.

navi: Ngenga 'itan Omatikayaä luyu set.
en: You are now a son of the Omaticaya.

navi: Na'viyä luyu hapxì.
en: You are part of The People.

navi: Tsampongut Tsu'teyìl iveyk.
en: Tsu'tey will lead the war party.

navi: Tsampongut Tsu'teyìl iveyk.
en: Tsu'tey will lead the war party.

navi: Tarontswot peyä frapol sweri.
en: Everyone praises his hunting ability.

navi: Tarontswot peyä frapol sweri.
en: Everyone praises his hunting ability.

navi: Pori oe nalsteng.
en: I feel compassion for him.

navi: Nga za’u nìltsan ne nari.
en: You look good.

navi: Po za’u nìfe’ ne nari.
en: She looks bad.

navi: Fìsyuve za’u nìfe’ ne ftxì.
en: This food tastes bad.

navi: Nga za’u nìfpxamo ne mikyun.
en: You sound terrible.

navi: Mokriri kempe lolen?
en: What happened to your voice?

navi: Plltxe Sawtute fa aylì’fya leketengsyon.
en: Humans speak a variety of languages.

navi: Plltxe Sawtute fa aylì’fya leketengsyon.

navi: Pori sa’nok tìmerkup, ’efu oe rayl.
en: His mother just died, I feel bad for him.

navi: Pori sa’nok tìmerkup, ’efu oe rayl.

navi: Eyweveng lu lornusrr.
en: Pandora is radiant.

navi: Fìtìngäzìkìri ’efu po kxäl; pori tsa’u ke tsranten kaw’it.
en: She’s apathetic about this problem, it doesn’t matter to her at all.

navi: Fìtìngäzìkìri ’efu po kxäl; pori tsa’u ke tsranten kaw’it.

navi: Tìkxäl lu peu?
en: What is apathy?

navi: Lu tskxepay a mì te’lan sì kxitx a mì eltu.
en: It’s ice in the heart and a death in the brain.

navi: Lu ngaru ’eveng apukap, slä smon oer fota pum amrr nì’aw.
en: You have six children, but I only know five of them.

navi: Na’viyä luyu hapxì.
en: You are part of the Na’vi.

navi: Tsu’teyìl tolìng oer mawlit smarä.
en: Tsu’tey gave me a half of the prey.

navi: Tsu’teyìl tolìng oer mawlit smarä.

navi: Omum oel teyngta lumpe po holum.
en: I know why he left.

navi: Omum oel teyngta lumpe po holum.

en: Sister Rini over there suggested that I introduce myself.

navi: Pol ngop frakrr sìkenongit a hìno lu nìhawng.
en: He always creates excessively detailed examples.

navi: Leno lu Loak nìtxan.
en: Loak is very thorough.

navi: Längu tìkangkem feyä luke tìno.
en: Unfortunately there is no attention to detail in their work.

navi: Ätxäle si oe pivawm, ngari soaiä ayhapxìtu lu supe?
en: May I ask who the people in your family are?

navi: Ätxäle si oe pivawm, ngari soaiä ayhapxìtu lu supe?

navi: Sa’nokìl oeyä tsmuket amip nolokx trram.
en: Mom gave birth to my new sister yesterday.

navi: Po ‘on si lo’aru fte livam na syaksyuk.
en: She shapes a totem to look like a syaksyuk.

en: I request the Dreamhunt.

en: I request the Dreamhunt.

navi: Ne tsenge atswawna’ kivä ko.

navi: Stäpawm moe.
en: We hear ourselves.

navi: Stäpawm moe.

navi: Lolu kllrikx, ulte tsaw ayweopxur apxa ‘on si.

navi: Tsurak Koohùriye ke larmu say nìwotx ke li: tsapo lolopx slele nìdi ulte Koohùri ke tsùn ‘ivìawn mì tal peye.
en: Ko’ohuri’s skimwing was not completely loyal yet; it panicked and swam in a frenzy and Ko’ohuri could not hold onto its back.

navi: Kuru ftu kuru hùm, tsaheyluti megu, tsurakìl Koohùriti dolìng hifwo.
en: The kurus detached, the bond was interrupted, and the skimwing abandoned Ko’ohuri to flee.
